# uptimekuma_notification_whapi (Resource)

Whapi (WhatsApp API) notification resource

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "uptimekuma_notification_whapi" "example" {
  name       = "Whapi Notifications"
  api_url    = "https://gate.whapi.cloud"
  auth_token = "your-whapi-auth-token"
  recipient  = "1234567890"
  is_active  = true
  is_default = false
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `api_url` (String, Sensitive) Whapi API endpoint URL
- `auth_token` (String, Sensitive) Whapi API authorization token
- `name` (String) Notification name
- `recipient` (String) Recipient phone number

### Optional

- `apply_existing` (Boolean)
- `is_active` (Boolean)
- `is_default` (Boolean)

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) Notification identifier
